description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Experimental that runs on push and pull request events to the master and dev branches. Use a matrix strategy to run a single job on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest, continuing on error for experimental builds. In each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.11-dev, install requirements from requirements-dev.txt and requirements.txt, and run Tox with the py environment.
